ddls:
CREATE TABLE "socioeconomic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of indicators */,
  "housing_price_index" INTEGER /* Index representing housing prices */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population count for the area */,
  "service_count" INTEGER /* Number of services available in the area */,
  "skilled_workforce_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of skilled workforce to total population */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income level in the area */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the area */,
  "household_count" INTEGER /* Total number of households in the area */,
  "income_score" REAL /* Score representing income level */,
  "service_score" REAL /* Score representing service availability */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the locations table */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the indicators are recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_socioeconomic_indicators_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the location */,
  "boundary" TEXT /* Geospatial boundary of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "housing_data" (
  "housing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for housing data */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the set of socioeconomic indicators */,
  "price_index" INTEGER /* Index representing housing prices */,
  "avg_price" REAL /* Average housing price in the area */,
  "price_trend" TEXT /* Trend of housing prices (e.g., increasing, stable, decreasing) */,
  "rental_price_index" INTEGER /* Index representing rental prices */,
  "avg_rental_price" REAL /* Average rental price in the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("housing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_data_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES socioeconomic_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for demographic data */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the set of socioeconomic indicators */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population count for the area */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of ages in the population */,
  "ethnic_diversity" TEXT /* Level of ethnic diversity in the area */,
  "population_growth_rate" REAL /* Rate of population growth */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Density of population in the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES socioeconomic_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for service data */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the set of socioeconomic indicators */,
  "service_count" INTEGER /* Number of services available in the area */,
  "service_types" TEXT /* Types of services available */,
  "service_quality" TEXT /* Quality of services provided */,
  "service_availability" TEXT /* Availability of services (e.g., 24/7, weekdays) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_services_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES socioeconomic_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workforce" (
  "workforce_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for workforce data */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the set of socioeconomic indicators */,
  "skilled_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of skilled workforce to total population */,
  "occupation_types" TEXT /* Types of occupations in the workforce */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Average education level of the workforce */,
  "industry_diversity" TEXT /* Diversity of industries in the workforce */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workforce_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workforce_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES socioeconomic_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economy" (
  "economy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for economic data */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the set of socioeconomic indicators */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income level in the area */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the area */,
  "economic_growth" TEXT /* Growth trend of the economy */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Rate of inflation */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* Rate of GDP growth */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("economy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economy_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES socioeconomic_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "households" (
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for household data */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the set of socioeconomic indicators */,
  "household_count" INTEGER /* Total number of households in the area */,
  "household_size" REAL /* Average size of households */,
  "ownership_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of homeowners to total households */,
  "rental_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of renters to total households */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("household_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_households_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES socioeconomic_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for score data */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the set of socioeconomic indicators */,
  "income_score" REAL /* Score representing income level */,
  "service_score" REAL /* Score representing service availability */,
  "overall_score" REAL /* Overall score combining income and service scores */,
  "education_score" REAL /* Score representing education quality */,
  "healthcare_score" REAL /* Score representing healthcare quality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES socioeconomic_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for education data */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the set of socioeconomic indicators */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Average education level in the area */,
  "school_count" INTEGER /* Number of schools in the area */,
  "student_teacher_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of students to teachers */,
  "graduation_rate" REAL /* Rate of high school graduation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES socioeconomic_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare" (
  "healthcare_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for healthcare data */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the set of socioeconomic indicators */,
  "healthcare_quality" TEXT /* Quality of healthcare in the area */,
  "hospital_count" INTEGER /* Number of hospitals in the area */,
  "doctor_patient_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of doctors to patients */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Average life expectancy in the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("healthcare_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_healthcare_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES socioeconomic_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., planner, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the set of indicators being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, analyze) */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES socioeconomic_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user creating the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, map, table) */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data used in the visualization */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the set of indicators used to make the prediction */,
  "prediction" TEXT /* Prediction made by the system */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "date_made" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES socioeconomic_indicators ("indicator_id")
)
